subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. It would be good to schedule a meeting to continue the partnership discussion.

The following slots are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

If one of those works, send over your preferred option and we can confirm a 30-minute slot.

I’m not able to share direct internal contact details or phone numbers. For the appropriate public contact channel, please refer to our public website.

Best regards,
